Name: Sciurini

SpecialAbilities.name: Glider
SpecialAbilities.description: Can glide at a ratio of 10:1, allowing for quick escape and long-range travel

SpecialAbilities.name: Patagium
SpecialAbilities.description: Furry membrane used for gliding and steering

SpecialAbilities.name: Velocity Philosophy
SpecialAbilities.description: A Sciurini's sense of safety is found in speed, making them uncomfortable with standing still

SpecialAbilities.name: Adrenaline Addiction
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini crave risk and danger, making them naturally thrill-seeking

SpecialAbilities.name: Vertical Caste
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini look down on ground-dwellers, viewing them as inferior

SpecialAbilities.name: Ghost-Logger
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini are skilled loggers, harvesting Ghost-Teak in the upper canopy

SpecialAbilities.name: Courier Guild
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini run the Flash-Post, a courier service that guarantees fast and secure delivery

SpecialAbilities.name: Drop-Trooper
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini are elite aerial warriors, using their speed and agility to outmaneuver enemies

SpecialAbilities.name: Touch-Code
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini use rapid shoulder taps to communicate flight paths in high winds

SpecialAbilities.name: Sleeping Habits
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini can only sleep in Sock-Hammocks suspended over open drops

SpecialAbilities.name: Twitching
SpecialAbilities.description: Sciurini are constantly stretching their membranes or checking wind direction, a nervous habit

Vulnerabilities: Ground-based attacks are effective against Sciurini due to their fragile bone structure
Falling from great heights can be lethal for Sciurini
